Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Valin]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 9''' — Valin named the House Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 9''' — Valin fashioned a key to open a Gate between his world and Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 11''' — Valin wanted to stop human sacrifice before changing his mind.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Valin the Wanderer forged Mithra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Valin the Wanderer killed King Zakareth the Fifth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Valin has been sealed away for twenty-five years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Valin is known as the Wanderer and the Incarnation of Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Valin's eyes have no whites and are dark with metallic silver irises.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Valin is a Valinhall Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Valin is Kai's former master.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Valin is free.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Valin was the first Valinhall Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Valin has fallen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Valin was the first of the group to fall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Valin is an Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Simon and Indirial are tasked with intercepting Valin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Valin is a man covered in the black chains of Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Valin is an Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Valin has eyes with solid black whites and gleaming steel colored parts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Valin possesses silver eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Valin's wound can knit itself whole with a bright green light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Valin has chains on his skin that writhe like black snakes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Valin uses a gold-and-silver sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Valin moves faster than Nye essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Valin possesses the speed of the Nye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Valin is known as the Wanderer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Valin uses a weapon called Dragon's Fang.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Valin's irises glow silver.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Valin is an Incarnation who fought Indirial evenly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Valin is a looming threat to Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — Valin hates Talos's father.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Valin raised twelve students to bring down Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Valin was sealed after a fight with Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Valin was sealed under a Hanging Tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — Valin is a person who spoke to Denner and Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — Valin uses the blade Mithra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Valin is the Incarnation and has black-and-silver eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Valin can draw on Nye essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Simon leaves a single slash across Valin’s forearm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Valin has black eyes that gleam with metallic silver.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Simon aimed to make Valin's head roll.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Simon fell on Valin's sword.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — Valin is the creator of Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 5''' — Valin carries short swords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 5''' — Valin has a coil of smoke or shadow wrapped around his ankles like a chain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — Valin is a former Incarnation and known as the Wanderer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — Valin is the founder of this Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — Valin's eyes can turn into silver circles on pools of solid black.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Valin is a deadly Incarnation who has returned to the House.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Valin's questions are often in Simon's thoughts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Valin destroyed a village.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Simon has fought Valin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Valin is a character Simon intends to ask questions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Valin carries a dagger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Valin's eyes are gray with a hint of metallic silver.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Valin's sword can be used in a three-part combination.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Valin is a character who has died before.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — Valin Incarnated due to a personal vendetta against Leah's grandfather or opposition to the sealing of Incarnations under Hanging Trees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — King Zakareth was unable to control Valin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Valin pronounced Simon fit for duty.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Valin did not like to call smoke.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Valin attacked people to see if they were strong enough to handle it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Valin's blade is being carried by the enemy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Valin, the Wanderer, is associated with the Dragon's Fang.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 23''' — Valin spoke of the joy of battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 23''' — Valin witnessed a double Avernus Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — Valin built the thirteenth bedroom.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
